title: Antigravity 3.0 (New Upgrades): Gemini 3.6, Agent Team-Up Option, Workbench, Low Thinking Effort
summary: Google released Antigravity 3.0 with major upgrades including multi-agent teamwork available on all paid plans, a Science Skills bundle for research workflows, improved Gemini 3.5 Flash variants, and CLI session syncing. The platform now supports specialized subagents running in parallel and integrates research databases like AlphaFold Database, PubMed, ChEMBL, and UniProt.
